title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.831 - Officer Walter W Farrow memorial highway designated for a portion of State Highway A in Miller County
text:
227.831.  Officer Walter W Farrow memorial highway designated for a portion of State Highway A in Miller County. — The portion of State Highway A from State Highway 42 continuing west to Boeckman Bridge Road in Miller County shall be designated the "Officer Walter W Farrow Memorial Highway".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway, with the costs to be paid by private donations.
(L. 2023 S.B. 127)
